ddls:
CREATE TABLE "button_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the button type (e.g., Default, Primary) */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme used for the button */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the button type */,
  "default_size_id" INTEGER /* Default size for the button type */,
  "default_style_id" INTEGER /* Default style for the button type */,
  "default_state_id" INTEGER /* Default state for the button type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the button size (e.g., Normal, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button size */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the button in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the button in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the button style (e.g., Flat, Raised) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button style */,
  "shadow_size" TEXT /* Size of the shadow for raised buttons */,
  "border_radius" INTEGER /* Border radius in pixels for rounded corners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the button state (e.g., Enabled, Disabled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button state */,
  "text_color" TEXT /* Text color when the button is in this state */,
  "background_color" TEXT /* Background color when the button is in this state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the UI component (e.g., Button, Dropdown) */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the UI component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the component was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the component */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_components_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is used */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component has been used */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the component was last used */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context in which the component is used */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component that was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the component */,
  "new_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new version of the component */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_updates_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_updates_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_updates_new_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_version_id") REFERENCES component_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "screenshot_url" TEXT /* URL to a screenshot of the component in use */,
  "suggested_changes" TEXT /* Suggested changes or improvements from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_feedback_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Whether the version is considered stable */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that has access to the component */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)
